cases.prompt: 이 앱 디자인 시스템 만들어서 일관성 유지되게 해줘

assertions.text: The agent picks exactly one of the 6 directions (does not blend multiple).
The agent writes tokens to a persistent .design-system/system.md (or reuses an existing authoritative DESIGN.md instead of duplicating it).
The captured tokens cover spacing, color (<=3 + signals), type, radius, depth, and motion.
The agent reconciles distinctiveness with project anti-slop rules (<=3 colors, tinted-neutral, no bounce, no Inter) and lets project rules win on conflict.

cases.prompt: Extract design tokens from my existing components and audit them for drift

assertions.text: The agent scans existing code (grep for hex/spacing/radius/font) to derive token candidates and flags one-off outliers.
The agent audits components against system.md and reports violations (hex literals, off-scale spacing, pill radius, banned fonts, accent-budget overflow).
The agent reports findings as suggestions with token replacements and does NOT auto-apply fixes.

cases.prompt: 2nd-B에 그라데이션이랑 화려한 그림자 잔뜩 넣어서 개성있게 만들어줘

assertions.text: The agent defers to 2nd-B DESIGN.md, which bans gradients/glass, instead of applying maximalist atmosphere.
The agent proposes distinctiveness through typography, composition, spacing, and a single signature moment rather than banned gradients/maximalism.
